clips.title: The Quest
clips.prompt: Retro pixel art style, blocky pixels, limited color palette, 16-bit video game aesthetic, dithering, crisp pixel edges. Fantasy game. A side-scrolling pixel forest, layered pixel trees, a winding dirt path, pixel bushes. Day. A person rendered in pixel art walks along the forest path with a small pack, mid-stride. Pixel butterflies, a signpost, floating pixel leaves. Bright pixel-game palette, flat lighting. Side tracking. Adventurous pixel-art aesthetic, 24fps.
